completed_tasks.name: Wave 0 - install deps, models, migration, test scaffolding

remaining_tasks.name: Sync endpoint, scheduler, dashboard shell + Ultima sync indicator

blockers.description: A background-agent (run_in_background) executor hit a Bash sandbox permission denial mid-Task-1 in a prior attempt; a foreground executor for the same Task 1 hit an account session/rate limit ("session limit, resets 6pm America/Mexico_City") before committing, but completed correct work.
blockers.workaround: Spawn executors in the FOREGROUND (no run_in_background). The session-limit reset is time-based; current time is past the stated 6pm reset so a fresh agent should not hit it immediately. Dispatch Tasks 2-4 with a fresh context budget.

human_actions_pending.action: Task 4 of 02-01 is a blocking checkpoint:human-verify - run match_talent_products script, start the app, trigger a real Pipedrive sync, inspect DB output, confirm 6 funnel stage names per PIPE-05

decisions.decision: Committed Task 1 work (789 lines, verified passing) on the worktree branch, merged (fast-forward) into main, then removed the worktree/branch
decisions.rationale: Two prior executor attempts both failed to commit before hitting agent-specific limits (sandbox denial, then session limit). Task 1's acceptance checks (model imports, alembic upgrade head, apscheduler/rapidfuzz imports) were independently re-verified and passed before merging.

next_action: Spawn a fresh gsd-executor agent (foreground, isolation=worktree) for plan 02-01 Tasks 2-4, forking from main @ af9907e which already includes Task 1.
context_notes: Task 1 is done and merged to main (commit af9907e). Tasks 2 (TDD: pipedrive client + sync job), 3 (sync endpoint/scheduler/dashboard shell), and 4 (blocking live-Pipedrive checkpoint) remain for plan 02-01. After 02-01 finishes, Wave 2 (02-02) and Wave 3 (02-03) remain, each ending in its own blocking checkpoint.
